title: HttpRequest
description: The HTTP request object (r) available in ngx_http_js_module handlers. Provides access to client request data and methods to produce a response.

args.description: Request arguments object parsed from the query string. Duplicate keys are returned as arrays.

headersOut.description: Outgoing response headers object (writable before headers are sent).

internal.description: True if the request is to an internal location.

requestBuffer.description: Client request body as a Buffer (since 0.5.0).

requestText.description: Client request body as a string.

responseBuffer.description: Subrequest response body as a Buffer.

responseText.description: Subrequest response body as a string.

rawHeadersIn.description: Raw incoming headers as an array of [name, value] pairs.

rawHeadersOut.description: Raw outgoing headers as an array of [name, value] pairs.

variables.description: NGINX variables object (writable for variables declared in config).

parent.description: Reference to the parent request object (for subrequests).

allOf.description: The HTTP request object (r) available in ngx_http_js_module handlers. Provides access to client request data and methods to produce a response.
